entry.title: IETLS Writing Task Files(About References)
entry.content:
关于一项雅思写作任务的文献阅读笔记

要求写作的题目，1000词左右：

At the present time, the population of some countries includes a relatively large number of young adults, compared with the number of older people. Do the advantages of this situation outweigh the disadvantages?

文献1认为：

Advantages:

  1. Youth-led programs can foster community cohesiveness and healing, according to peacebuilding theory (PBT).

Disadvantages:

  1. According to the Youth Bulge Theory (YBT) ,if economic opportunities are scarce, cultures with disproportionately large youth populations are more likely to face instability
    1. Young people become frustrated
    2. more vulnerable to being recruited by armed organizations or engaging in criminal activity
    3. labor markets are unable to accommodate this expanding workforce
  2. According to conflict theory(CT), youth unemployment in Africa exacerbates economic marginalization and suffering, leading to grievances that incite youth violence.

References:
[1] Youth at the crossroads: balancing contributions to conflict and peace amid high unemployment in Africa
[2] China’s demographic dividend has moved from age-based labor supply to skill-based productivity
[3] Age structure and democratic development: the nonlinear and conditional role of youth bulges
